bio.intro: I'm a Flutter Developer and Computer Engineering graduate with hands-on experience building real-world mobile applications across academic projects, hackathons, freelancing, and technical instruction.
bio.journey: Throughout my journey, I worked on multiple end-to-end applications, from idea and system design to implementation, testing, and deployment. My background in software engineering fundamentals combined with exposure to AI and machine learning enables me to build mobile solutions that are both scalable and data-aware.
bio.values: I value consistency over perfection, continuous learning, and building software that solves real problems. I'm especially interested in mobile roles where clean architecture, product thinking, and long-term code quality matter.

learning.heroDesc: From a Computer Engineering degree to cutting-edge ML specializations — a chronicle of continuous evolution.

nti.org: NTI · National Telecom Institute · Huawei HCIA-AI
nti.desc: 120-hour intensive AI training at the National Telecom Institute covering Python data science, ML/DL fundamentals, and a Covid detector capstone project.

cairo.desc: Comprehensive computer engineering education. Graduated with Very Good with Honors.

coursera.desc: Comprehensive ML program covering supervised learning, neural networks, unsupervised clustering, recommender systems, and reinforcement learning.

orange.desc: Advanced enterprise Flutter program: Bloc/Cubit state management, MVVM architecture, and pixel-perfect production UI in an Agile team.

learning.title: Learning Journey
learning.subtitle: Continuous growth through courses and certifications

teaching.heroTitle: Shaping the Next Generation of Builders
teaching.heroDesc: From hands-on Flutter diplomas to government ML initiatives — taught 35+ students across 4+ tracks.
teaching.ratingBanner: 4.9 / 5.0 average — from 35+ students across Flutter, ML, Java & Python tracks

maspero.org: Maspero Academy · Radio & Television Institute, Egypt
maspero.desc: Delivered Python programming fundamentals to CS students covering data types, control flow, functions, OOP and problem-solving patterns.
maspero.b1: Focused on bridging theoretical concepts with real coding problems
maspero.b2: Created hands-on exercises tailored to beginner-level learners

depi.org: DEPI Initiative · Ministry of Communications & IT, Egypt
depi.desc: Delivered a comprehensive ML engineering curriculum under DEPI. Integrated own notes, labs, and led a 1-month phased capstone project through to defense.
depi.b1: Covered Statistics, Linear Algebra, NumPy/Pandas, and model training with custom labs
depi.b2: Designed a 1-month phased capstone project framework, monitored teams to product-defense seminar
depi.b3: Integrated personalized feedback loops and motivation throughout the track

primaLab.desc: Delivered Flutter Level 1 — from zero programming background through Dart to real Flutter applications across 28+ sessions.
primaLab.b1: Designed all materials, notes, and 10+ assignments across 28+ sessions from scratch
primaLab.b2: Supervised a capstone project: Dart shopping system with cart management and checkout
primaLab.b3: Scope: Dart OOP & async, Flutter widgets & layouts, stateful/stateless, navigation

volunteer.desc: Volunteered to teach IT skills to orphanage staff, helping them with practical technology tools.

teaching.title: Teaching & Volunteering
teaching.subtitle: Sharing knowledge and giving back to the community

volunteen.title: VolunTeen
volunteen.subtitle: AI-Powered Volunteering platform for teenagers
volunteen.overview: A solo-developed Flutter application targeting teenagers with 30-40 screens, featuring AI chatbot integration and a complete management system.
volunteen.challenge: Designing a complex, feature-rich platform that remains engaging and simple enough for a teenage audience while integrating advanced AI capabilities.
volunteen.approach: Adopted an MVC architecture for maintainability. I personally implemented the UI/UX my client provided and integrated GPT-3 for a personalized assistant experience.
volunteen.solution: Successfully launched a professional-grade mobile app with sub-second response times and a verified reward system for active volunteers.
contributions: Developed 30-40 screens independently using Flutter/Dart
Implemented MVC architecture for scalable code structure
Integrated GPT-3 API for the intelligent volunteering assistant
Added different ways of awareness providing ranging between (Articles, Videos and AI Assistant)
Added Real people's support with their contact method.
Added Example UIs for a community, helping categories, certification system, announcements, and more!

checkit.title: Check-It
checkit.subtitle: Consumer Rights & Product Verification
checkit.overview: A specialized mobile tool [Prototype] designed to empower consumers by providing instant access to product verification and reporting mechanisms for over-expensive goods.
checkit.challenge: Creating a seamless bridge between physical barcodes and digital consumer protection databases while maintaining ease of use for the general public.
checkit.approach: I implemented a high-speed barcode scanning module and built a multi-step complaint wizard to enable the user to file a complient with the product details, location and receit evidence of over-pricing.
checkit.solution: A production-ready utility that successfully facilitates consumer reporting and helps regulatory bodies track illicit market activity effectively.
contributions: Implemented high-performance barcode scanning using Flutter packages
Developed a state-driven multi-step reporting wizard, with the ability to track the complaint status
Built the local storage history and sync logic
Designed the UI/UX following clean material guidelines

ecosort.title: EcoSort Smart Recycling
ecosort.subtitle: IoT-enabled gamified recycling application
ecosort.overview: An IoT-focused recycling app that connects users to smart bins via Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) to track and reward eco-friendly actions.
ecosort.challenge: Establishing reliable communication with proprietary smart hardware and preventing fraud in the reward system.
ecosort.approach: I reverse-engineered the bin's BLE protocol to enable direct interaction. For security, I built a signature-based QR validation system.
ecosort.solution: Enabled a network of 50+ smart bins to function seamlessly with a fraud-proof point attribution system.
contributions: Reverse-engineered the Blync smart bin BLE communication protocol
Implemented secure QR validation with HMAC-SHA256 signatures
Built the points calculation engine with streak-based bonuses
Integrated real-time IoT sensor readings into the Flutter UI

hypermate.title: HyperMate IoT
hypermate.subtitle: Real-time stress monitoring via ESP8266
hypermate.overview: A solo client project bridging the gap between IoT hardware and mobile health tracking using GSR sensors.
hypermate.challenge: Maintaining stable data streams from microcontrollers via Wi-Fi and providing actionable health insights in real-time.
hypermate.approach: I created a custom Wi-Fi service to communicate with ESP8266 and implemented an AI-driven suggestion engine for user wellness.
hypermate.solution: A fully functional IoT health tracker that interprets physiological data to provide personalized stress-relief recommendations.
contributions: Built the custom Wi-Fi communication bridge for ESP8266
Developed real-time GSR sensor data visualization widgets
Integrated a wellness recommendation engine based on stress levels
Managed the end-to-end solo development for a private client

tapcash.title: TapCash FinTech
tapcash.subtitle: Modern financial management and data visualization
tapcash.overview: A polished fintech app prototype demonstrating secure mobile payments, spending insights, and wallet management.
tapcash.challenge: Creating a premium UI with complex data visualizations that remains performant on varied mobile hardware.
tapcash.approach: I built a custom widget architecture for financial indicators and used specialized charting libraries for spending insights.
tapcash.solution: A high-fidelity prototype delivered in a 2-week hackathon, recognized for its exceptional UI/UX by industry judges.
contributions: Designed the primary financial dashboard and spending 'Insights'
Implemented custom bottom navigation and reusable card widgets
Built reactive UI components for balance tracking
Presented the solution at Orange Digital Center's Eid Hackathon

redditClone.title: Reddix — Reddit Clone
redditClone.subtitle: Full-featured social platform built in a team sprint
redditClone.overview: A complete Reddit mobile app clone developed as part of a software house team sprint following Agile methodology with MVC-S architecture. Implemented the community management, settings, and authentication modules end-to-end.
redditClone.challenge: Delivering a production-grade social platform with community management, user settings, and auth flows in a team environment while following MVC-S architecture and avoiding state management conflicts across feature modules.
redditClone.approach: Owned three major modules independently: Community Creation (full CRUD flow, typed community forms, rules dialog), User Settings (account settings, email management, blocking/permissions), and Authentication (forgot password, username recovery, reset email confirmation).
redditClone.solution: A fully functional social ecosystem with live community creation, left/right drawer navigation, comprehensive account settings, and end-to-end auth recovery flows — demoed in a public YouTube Short.
contributions: Built the complete Community Creation flow: form validation, community type selection, rules dialog
Implemented left drawer with dynamic community list and right drawer with user actions
Developed full Settings & Account Settings modules (email, password, privacy, permissions)
Built Auth recovery flows: forgot password, username recovery, reset email confirmation
Configured Provider-based state management with MVC-S for zero cross-module conflicts

eplReservation.title: EPL Ticket Reservation
eplReservation.subtitle: Match ticketing system and admin intelligence dashboard
eplReservation.overview: A full-stack reservation system for Premier League matches, featuring a high-performance Flutter web admin panel.
eplReservation.challenge: Handling concurrent seat bookings and visualizing complex match occupancy data for administrators.
eplReservation.approach: I utilized Provider for reactive state management on the web. I designed custom charts to provide real-time occupancy insights.
eplReservation.solution: A robust system with sub-second data synchronization and a secure, JWT-authenticated administration flow.
contributions: Developed the entire Admin Dashboard using Flutter Web
Implemented a JWT auto-refresh mechanism for seamless security
Built interactive data visualizations for revenue and occupancy
Designed the seat-map logic with optimistic state updates

usAccidents.title: US Accidents Analysis
usAccidents.subtitle: Big Data pipeline for 7.7M traffic records
usAccidents.overview: A distributed computing project analyzing massive traffic datasets to predict accident severity and risk factors.
usAccidents.challenge: Processing nearly 8 million records on traditional software was impossible; the system required a cloud-native distributed architecture.
usAccidents.approach: I designed and implemented a custom MapReduce Linear Regression from scratch and configured the cloud orchestration on GCP.
usAccidents.solution: Reduced processing time by 90% (from hours to minutes) and achieved 84% predictive accuracy using Random Forest.
contributions: Designed and implemented MapReduce Linear Regression RDDs manually
Led the EDA phase: 80+ hours of forensic data cleaning and analysis
Configured Mage orchestration on GCP for 10+ ETL pipelines
Optimized Random Forest hyperparameters for peak accuracy

vpredicto.title: vPredicto
vpredicto.subtitle: Open-source Deep Learning library for Video Prediction
vpredicto.overview: An open-source Python library implementing state-of-the-art architectures for future frame prediction in video sequences.
vpredicto.challenge: Standardizing disparate research models into a single, cohesive API while maintaining high fidelity in spatio-temporal memory.
vpredicto.approach: I architected the library's foundation using abstract models and implemented complex GhU (Gradient Highway) units to solve deep training issues.
vpredicto.solution: An A+ grade graduation project achieving state-of-the-art SSIM scores and an extensible framework for future researchers.
contributions: Architected the library foundation and unified BaseModel API
Implemented CausalLSTM and GhU units from research papers
Designed the differential memory tracking for the MIM model
Achieved A+ grade and published library on GitHub

phishing.title: Phishing Detection
phishing.subtitle: Security-focused ML classifier
phishing.overview: A machine learning system designed to protect users by identifying phishing websites with 96% accuracy.
phishing.challenge: Accurately identifying deceptive URLs that mimic real domains while keeping false negatives near zero.
phishing.approach: I engineered 30+ security features, including HTTPS validity and domain age, and optimized the ensemble model using grid search.
phishing.solution: A high-precision classifier that successfully identifies complex phishing attempts on imbalanced real-world datasets.
contributions: Engineered 30+ technical features for URL and structure analysis
Implemented SMOTE algorithms to handle extreme class imbalance
Optimized the Random Forest ensemble via GridSearchCV
Evaluated 12 different architectures to find the optimal solution

lineFollower.title: Embedded CV Line Follower
lineFollower.subtitle: Computer Vision for autonomous cars
lineFollower.overview: A smart navigation project using a mobile camera to drive an autonomous vehicle through steering angle calculation.
lineFollower.challenge: Real-time image processing on mobile devices with high frame rates and precise motor control via wireless sockets.
lineFollower.approach: I built an OpenCV pipeline in C++ and connected it to the Android UI using JNI for zero-copy high-performance processing.
lineFollower.solution: A nimble autonomous car that tracks complex paths in real-time with PID-based steering stabilization.
contributions: Implemented the OpenCV C++ pipeline for Hough Line detection
Designed the JNI bridge for efficient frame transfer in Android
Developed the PID controller for steering angle stabilization
Integrated TCP socket communication for real-time motor commands

mipsProcessor.title: MIPS 5-Stage Processor
mipsProcessor.subtitle: CPU architecture and pipelining
mipsProcessor.overview: A hardware-level project implementing a full pipelined MIPS CPU in Verilog, featuring advanced hazard resolution.
mipsProcessor.challenge: Maintaining high clock speeds while solving complex data and control hazards across five pipeline stages.
mipsProcessor.approach: I designed the Decode stage logic and integrated data forwarding paths to eliminate stalling in most instruction sequences.
mipsProcessor.solution: A functional CPU achieving a 1.2 CPI, verified against sorting and mathematical programs on ModelSim.
contributions: Designed the instruction lookup and Decode stage logic
Generated all 15 core control signals for the execution pipeline
Implemented EX and MEM forwarding paths to bypass hazards
Verified correctness using 40+ hours of ModelSim waveform analysis

circuitsSolver.title: Circuits Solver Engine
circuitsSolver.subtitle: SPICE-inspired Nodal Analysis simulatorv
circuitsSolver.overview: A powerful C++ engine for solving arbitrary linear circuits using high-performance linear algebra and Modified Nodal Analysis.
circuitsSolver.challenge: Modeling complex components like dependent sources and passive elements in a single, stable matrix system.
circuitsSolver.approach: I designed an object-oriented Component hierarchy with virtual MNA stamping and integrated the Eigen library for speed.
circuitsSolver.solution: A simulator capable of solving 500-node circuits in just 18ms, matching the accuracy of professional tools like LTspice.
contributions: Solo-implemented the entire 1500+ line C++ simulation engine
Designed the Component hierarchy and virtual MNA stamping logic
Integrated the Eigen library for high-speed linear algebra
Validated solution accuracy against LTspice benchmarks

logicSimulator.title: Logic Gate Simulator
logicSimulator.subtitle: Interactive GUI for digital circuit design
logicSimulator.overview: A desktop simulator for designing and testing digital logic circuits with a focus on usability and robust state management.
logicSimulator.challenge: Enabling complex user interactions like multi-level undo/redo while ensuring correct signal propagation across large gates.
logicSimulator.approach: I implemented the Command Pattern for all interface actions and orchestrated the system using a central Application Manager.
logicSimulator.solution: A polished educational tool supporting multi-input gates, propagation delays, and binary file persistence.
contributions: Architected the central Application Manager and system state engine
Implemented the Command Pattern for 12 types of undo/redo actions
Built the event-driven engine for efficient gate simulation
Designed the custom binary serialization format for project saving

osScheduler.title: OS Process Scheduler
osScheduler.subtitle: Low-level Linux kernel simulation
osScheduler.overview: A C-based system modeling the internals of an Operating System's process scheduling and resource management.
osScheduler.challenge: Simulating high-concurrency process flows and implementing multiple scheduling algorithms like Round Robin and Priority.
osScheduler.approach: I implemented the core clock-driven simulation loop and memory management modules to handle process lifecycles.
osScheduler.solution: A robust scheduler capable of calculating performance metrics across simulated process bursts with full architectural visibility.
contributions: Developed the main clock-driven simulation loop in C
Implemented Round Robin and Priority-based scheduling logic
Built the process lifecycle and memory management modules
Designed the performance metric reporting (Turnaround/Wait time)

searchEngine.title: Search Engine Architecture
searchEngine.subtitle: Web crawler and TF-IDF ranker
searchEngine.overview: A modular Java search engine featuring high-concurrency crawling and intelligent ranking for web pages.
searchEngine.challenge: Managing thousands of concurrent network requests while ensuring the crawler follows robots.txt rules and avoids traps.
searchEngine.approach: I solo-implemented the multi-threaded crawler using Java's ExecutorService with a persistent BFS frontier to disk.
searchEngine.solution: A fault-tolerant crawler that successfully indexed 50,000+ pages with high throughput and reliable ranked retrieval.
contributions: Implemented the multi-threaded crawler (2000+ lines of Java)
Built the robots.txt parser and URL canonicalization logic
Designed the disk-persistent BFS queue for fault tolerance
Co-developed the TF-IDF ranking and keyword highlighting logic

goDfs.title: Distributed File System
goDfs.subtitle: Fault-tolerant DFS with MP4 streaming
goDfs.overview: A distributed file system built in Go supporting file replication, fault tolerance, and MP4 video streaming across multiple nodes.
goDfs.challenge: Building a reliable file system that maintains data integrity during node failures and supports real-time media streaming.
goDfs.approach: Implemented TCP-based node communication with heartbeat monitoring, chunk-based file transfer, and custom replication protocols.
goDfs.solution: A high-concurrency distributed storage system that gracefully handles node failures and streams video content in real-time.
contributions: Designed the distributed architecture with master/data node topology
Implemented TCP socket communication and heartbeat monitoring
Built chunk-based file transfer with configurable replication factor
Added MP4 streaming support for real-time video playback

rsaChat.title: RSA Encrypted Chat
rsaChat.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted messaging
rsaChat.overview: A secure messaging application implementing RSA encryption from scratch using Python sockets for truly private communication.
rsaChat.challenge: Implementing RSA key generation, encryption, and decryption from mathematical primitives without relying on cryptography libraries.
rsaChat.approach: Built the entire RSA pipeline from scratch: prime generation, modular exponentiation, key pair creation, and socket-based message exchange.
rsaChat.solution: A functional E2E encrypted chat system demonstrating deep understanding of public-key cryptography fundamentals.
contributions: Implemented RSA key generation with prime number testing
Built modular exponentiation for efficient encryption/decryption
Designed the TCP socket-based message exchange protocol
Created the full encrypt-transmit-decrypt pipeline

gamingo.title: Gamingo Game Engine
gamingo.subtitle: Custom 3D game engine in C++
gamingo.overview: A custom-built 3D game engine implementing core graphics rendering, physics simulation, and entity management from scratch.
gamingo.challenge: Building a performant rendering pipeline and physics system that work together seamlessly for real-time 3D applications.
gamingo.approach: Designed modular engine components: renderer, physics engine, entity-component system, and input manager with clean separation of concerns.
gamingo.solution: A functional game engine capable of rendering 3D scenes with basic physics, collision detection, and entity management.
contributions: Built the core rendering pipeline with OpenGL
Implemented basic physics simulation and collision detection
Designed the entity-component system for game object management
Created the game loop with fixed timestep for consistent physics

marsExploration.title: Mars Exploration Simulation
marsExploration.subtitle: Mission scheduling with advanced data structures
marsExploration.overview: A complex simulation of Mars rover missions, optimizing resource allocation and mission scheduling using advanced data structures.
marsExploration.challenge: Efficiently scheduling concurrent rover missions with varying priorities, resource constraints, and terrain obstacles.
marsExploration.approach: Used priority queues, balanced BSTs, and custom scheduling algorithms to optimize mission throughput and resource utilization.
marsExploration.solution: A simulation engine that efficiently manages multiple concurrent Mars missions with optimal resource allocation.
contributions: Designed the mission scheduling algorithm with priority management
Implemented balanced BST for efficient mission lookup and insertion
Built terrain traversal cost calculation using graph algorithms
Created performance analytics for mission success metrics

mushafImad.title: Mushaf-IMAD Flutter
mushafImad.subtitle: Open-source Quran audio integration — Itqan Community
mushafImad.overview: Contributed to an open-source Quran reader Flutter package by integrating the Quran.com API as a full audio source. The contribution spans OAuth 2.0 authentication, a reactive streaming sync system, a hybrid audio engine, and a comprehensive test suite of 80+ tests using Mocktail.
mushafImad.challenge: The existing package had no cloud audio integration. The task required designing a seamless hybrid system that could dynamically fall back between local and cloud sources while maintaining zero-latency verse-to-audio sync.
mushafImad.approach: Implemented OAuth 2.0 token management, built a reactive verse metadata injection pipeline using Stream Transformers, and created an in-memory caching layer that reduced API latency by 86%. All logic was driven by TDD with Mocktail for complex async repository testing.
mushafImad.solution: A robust hybrid audio engine with single-trip optimizations, a RAM → Local → API timing hierarchy ensuring zero-latency playback sync, and architectural walkthroughs published for long-term community maintainability.
contributions: Integrated Quran.com API via OAuth 2.0 with custom in-memory caching (86% latency reduction)
Developed reactive sync system with Stream Transformers for real-time verse metadata injection
Engineered a Hybrid Audio Engine with dynamic fallback between local and cloud sources
Authored 80+ unit and integration tests using Mocktail for async repository logic
Published architectural guides and walkthroughs for community maintainability
